Reference only. Follow the current Hatzalah of Houston Patient Care Guidelines (Lars Thestrup, MD). Some protocols are algorithm charts in the manual and may show partial text here — always confirm against the official guidelines.

Source: Hatzalah of Houston Patient Care Guidelines & Standing Orders (Dec 2024). This is a training reference, not a substitute for the official manual or medical direction.
